popularStory.headline: John de Hastings
popularStory.description: John Hastings, 1st Baron Hastings (6 May 1262 – 28 February 1313) was an English peer and soldier of the Middle Ages. Hastings was a competitor for the Scottish throne in 1290/92 in the Great Cause. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings於1262年5月6日出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾阿利斯利時，他的父親Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings27歲，母親Joane de Cantilupe21歲。他於1275年7月15日與Isabel de Valence在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1302年被列為 lieutenant and seneschal of gascony。他去世於1313年2月28日在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年50歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings于1262年5月6日出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾阿利斯利时，他的父亲Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings27岁，母亲Joane de Cantilupe21岁。他于1275年7月15日与Isabel de Valence在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1302年被列为 lieutenant and seneschal of gascony。他去世于1313年2月28日在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年50岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings was born on 6 May 1262, in Allesley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, was 27 and his mother, Joane de Cantilupe, was 21. He married Isabel de Valence on 15 July 1275, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. In 1302, at the age of 40, his occupation is listed as  lieutenant and seneschal of gascony. He died on 28 February 1313, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 50, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings est né le 6 mai 1262, à Allesley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joane de Cantilupe, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Valence le 15 juillet 1275, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. En 1302, à l’âge de 40 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est  lieutenant and seneschal of gascony. Il est décédé le 28 février 1313, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, England: Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings am 6. Mai 1262 in Allesley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings 27 und seine Mutter Joane de Cantilupe 21. Er hat am 15. Juli 1275 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Isabel de Valence geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1302, als er 40 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als  lieutenant and seneschal of gascony aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. Februar 1313 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings è nato il il 6 maggio 1262 nel Allesley, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joane de Cantilupe, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Valence il 15 luglio 1275, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1302, all'età di 40 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come  lieutenant and seneschal of gascony. Morì il 28 febbraio 1313, nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hastings 1st Baron Hastingsが1262年5月6日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアレスリーで生まれた時，父Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastingsは27歳，母Joane de Cantilupeは21歳であった。1275年7月15日にイギリスイギリスエセックスでIsabel de Valenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1302年，40歳の時，職業は lieutenant and seneschal of gasconyと記録されている。彼は1313年2月28日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで50歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.Salisbury St Edmund, Wiltshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이 스트 에드먼드
ko.lifeSummary: John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings(이)가 1262년 5월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 앨레슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane de Cantilupe(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1275년 7월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Isabel de Valence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1302년, 40세의 나이로 그의 직업은  lieutenant and seneschal of gascony이었다. 그는 1313년 2월 28일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, England: Sutton Scotney, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings nasceu em 6 de maio de 1262, em Allesley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Cantilupe, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Valence em 15 de julho de 1275, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1302, com 40 anos, sua profissão aparece como  lieutenant and seneschal of gascony. Ele faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1313, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.Salisbury St Edmund, Wiltshire, England,: салисбури ст эдмунд, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings родился 6 мая 1262 г. в местности аллесли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Cantilupe, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Valence 15 июля 1275 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1302 году, в возрасте 40 лет,  он работал по профессии  lieutenant and seneschal of gascony. Он умер 28 февраля 1313 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings nació el 6 de mayo de 1262, en Allesley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joane de Cantilupe, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Isabel de Valence el 15 de julio de 1275, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1302, a la edad de 40 años, su ocupación registrada era  lieutenant and seneschal of gascony. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1313, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
